# empirical-prompt-tuning

> Use when you explicitly want to evaluate and improve a skill, prompt, or instruction set with repeated fresh-agent trials, structured self-reporting, and scenario-based measurement instead of relying on author intuition.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/empirical-prompt-tuning
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/empirical-prompt-tuning
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add HukuKaich0u/agent-kit --skill empirical-prompt-tuning
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/empirical-prompt-tuning ~/.claude/skills/empirical-prompt-tuning
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->

# empirical-prompt-tuning

skill や prompt や instruction を、思い込みではなく反復評価で改善するための meta skill です。

Claude / Codex の両方で使う前提で整えています。評価ループと運用ルールは [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) を参照してください。
